film.title: Category 5
film.overview: After a family survives Hurricane Katrina, there is another storm but this one is much worse.

dialogues.dialogue: You're a man now.  In my book, anyway.  And I'm damn proud of you.  I'm just doing what I can do to help.  Yeah, just keep it up.
dialogues.cause_raw: for becoming a man and helping

dialogues.dialogue: but today we have a unique one.  You know her as Victoria dupuis, ahead of the curve.  I'm so proud of you, sweetheart.  You're so brave.  Your mama would be so proud.
I'm so proud of you, sweetheart.  You're so brave.  Your mama would be so proud.  All right, it's your moment to shine.  You tell them your story. All right.
